Table	Create Table
lessons	CREATE TABLE `lessons` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `studentId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `coachId` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `scheduledAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `durationMinutes` int(11) DEFAULT '60',
  `timezone` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'UTC',
  `topic` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `meetingUrl` varchar(500) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','confirmed','paid','in_progress','completed','released','cancelled','disputed','refunded') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'pending',
  `amountCents` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `commissionCents` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `coachPayoutCents` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `currency` varchar(3) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT 'USD',
  `stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `stripeTransferId` varchar(64) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `studentConfirmedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `coachConfirmedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `payoutAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `refundWindowEndsAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci AUTO_INCREMENT=150001
